description_long: This object is a set of two rows of computer workstations arranged back-to-back on a large rectangular wooden table, separated by tall white privacy dividers. Each station features a flat-screen monitor, a desktop computer tower, a keyboard, a mouse, and a pair of compact speakers, all neatly organized. The workstations are paired with modern black office chairs that have metal bases and armrests, providing ergonomic seating. The table is supported by sturdy black cylindrical legs and is placed on a large gray rectangular floor mat. The overall setup is designed for shared use, maximizing space while maintaining individual privacy. The clean, minimalist design and neutral color palette suggest a contemporary, functional environment typical of an urban internet cafe.
description: A modern internet cafe workstation setup with two rows of computer stations, privacy dividers, and black office chairs on a large table. The arrangement is clean, functional, and designed for shared use.
description_view_0: Front view showing two computer stations with privacy dividers, monitors, and black office chairs facing the viewer.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the table, all four computer stations, and the arrangement of privacy dividers between them.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with two computer stations and chairs visible from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing the length of the table and the back-to-back arrangement of the stations.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: Four computer stations are clearly visible, arranged in two rows with privacy dividers and paired with black office chairs.
